mapper.select: SELECT WORK_ID, USER_ID, WORK_DATE, RAW_START AS rawStart, RAW_END AS rawEnd, MAIN_START AS mainStart, MAIN_END AS mainEnd, BASE, MAIN, EXTRA_1 AS extra1, EXTRA_2 AS extra2, OT_START AS otStart, OT_END AS otEnd, IS_OT AS isOt, DAY_TYPE AS dayType, LATE_IN AS lateIn, EARLY_OUT AS earlyOut, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM WORK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND WORK_DATE = #{workDate, jdbcType=DATE}

SELECT WORK_ID, USER_ID, WORK_DATE, RAW_START AS rawStart, RAW_END AS rawEnd, MAIN_START AS mainStart, MAIN_END AS mainEnd, BASE, MAIN, EXTRA_1 AS extra1, EXTRA_2 AS extra2, OT_START AS otStart, OT_END AS otEnd, IS_OT AS isOt, DAY_TYPE AS dayType, LATE_IN AS lateIn, EARLY_OUT AS earlyOut, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM WORK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE} AND #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE} ORDER BY WORK_DATE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORK ( USER_ID, WORK_DATE, RAW_START, RAW_END, MAIN_START, MAIN_END, BASE, MAIN, EXTRA_1, EXTRA_2, OT_START, OT_END, IS_OT, DAY_TYPE, LATE_IN, EARLY_OUT, REMARK ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{rawStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rawEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{mainStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{mainEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, COALESCE(#{base, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), COALESCE(#{main, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), COALESCE(#{extra1, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), COALESCE(#{extra2, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), #{otStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{otEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, COALESCE(#{isOt, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, 0), COALESCE(#{dayType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'NOM'), #{lateIn, jdbcType=TIME}, #{earlyOut, jdbcType=TIME}, #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE WORK
RAW_START = NULL, RAW_END = NULL, MAIN_START = NULL,
MAIN_END = NULL, MAIN_END = #{mainEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OT_START = NULL, OT_START = #{otStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OT_END = NULL, OT_END = #{otEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RAW_START = #{rawStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RAW_END = #{rawEnd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, MAIN_START = #{mainStart, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BASE = #{base, jdbcType=INTEGER}, MAIN = #{main, jdbcType=INTEGER}, EXTRA_1 = #{extra1, jdbcType=INTEGER}, EXTRA_2 = #{extra2, jdbcType=INTEGER}, IS_OT = #{isOt, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, DAY_TYPE = #{dayType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LATE_IN = #{lateIn, jdbcType=TIME}, EARLY_OUT = #{earlyOut, jdbcType=TIME}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND WORK_DATE = #{workDate, jdbcType=DATE}
